title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hindustan Unilever - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hindustan Unilever - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Unilever has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hindustan Unilever:
Hindustan Unilever is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Unilever!
